attributes.action: Introduce mandatory nutritionist-led education within UK drama school training
attributes.additional_details: Developed as part of a dissertation project, this highlights a gap in performer training. Students face high physical demands without education on nutrition or wellbeing, increasing risk of unsustainable practices. Structured support would promote long-term health and sustainability to an industry that annually contributes an estimated £10 billion to the economy.
attributes.background: Require accredited UK drama schools to include nutritionist-led education and access to qualified wellbeing support, ensuring performers are trained with sustainable health practices alongside technical development.

rejection.details: We cannot accept this petition as it is not about something which the UK Government or Parliament is responsible for.
